HIV Viral Load 
URL of this page: https://medlineplus.gov/lab-tests/hiv-viral-load/ 
HIV Viral Load 
To use the sharing features on this page, please enable JavaScript. 
What is an HIV viral load test? 
An HIV viral load test measures the amount of HIV in a sample of your blood. HIV stands for human immunodeficiency virus. The test looks for genetic material from the virus in your blood. These tests are called molecular tests or nucleic acid amplification tests (NAAT or NAT). There are several types of NAAT tests. A PCR test Â is one type of NAAT that may be u
